steps.title: Close the appositive
steps.content: The phrase "the International Criminal Police Organization" renames Interpol. Because the phrase is opened with an em dash after "Interpol," it needs a matching closing dash before the sentence continues with "in 1961."

steps.title: Reject mismatched punctuation
steps.content: B uses a colon, which does not match the opening dash. C uses a comma, creating inconsistent punctuation around the appositive. D leaves the appositive unclosed, so the reader cannot clearly see where the parenthetical phrase ends. The answer is A.
